metadata.description: Remaining tasks for Simple Workout Creation feature - Integration and Testing layers

tasks.title: Extend WorkoutSyncWorker for Simple Workouts
tasks.description: Modify the existing WorkoutSyncWorker to handle syncing SimpleWorkout entities to Firestore alongside existing workout sync functionality

implementation_details.approach: Extend existing sync worker to handle both regular workouts and simple workouts in a single sync operation

acceptance_criteria: Simple workouts are uploaded to 'simple_workouts' Firestore collection
Sync worker handles both regular and simple workouts in single execution
Local simple workouts marked as synced after successful upload
Error handling preserves existing sync behavior for regular workouts
Sync metrics include count of both workout types
validation_steps: Create simple workout locally and trigger sync
Verify workout appears in Firestore simple_workouts collection
Verify local entity marked as synced
Test error scenarios (network failure, auth failure)
Verify existing workout sync functionality unchanged
potential_risks: Performance impact of syncing two workout types

tasks.title: Create Simple Workout Analytics Events
tasks.description: Extend AnalyticsService and LogWorkoutEventUseCase to track simple workout creation and completion events with specific metrics

implementation_details.approach: Add parallel analytics methods for simple workouts with relevant metrics (exercise count, total sets, creation time)
functions_to_implement: AnalyticsService.logSimpleWorkoutCreated(userId: String, workoutId: String, exerciseCount: Int, totalSets: Int)

acceptance_criteria: Simple workout creation events tracked with exercise count and total sets
Events include user ID, workout ID, and creation timestamp
Analytics distinguish between simple workouts and regular workouts
Events properly categorized for reporting and analysis
Error handling prevents analytics failures from affecting workout creation
validation_steps: Create simple workout and verify analytics event fired
Check Firebase Analytics dashboard for simple workout events
Verify event parameters include correct metrics
Test error scenarios don't break workout creation flow
potential_risks: Event naming conflicts with existing events

tasks.title: Integrate Analytics into Simple Workout Creation Flow
tasks.description: Connect the analytics logging to the actual simple workout creation use case to automatically track events when workouts are created

implementation_details.approach: Add analytics call to CreateSimpleWorkoutUseCase after successful workout creation, with proper error handling
tests_to_write: Extend existing CreateSimpleWorkoutUseCaseTest to verify analytics integration

acceptance_criteria: Analytics event automatically fired on successful simple workout creation
Analytics failures don't prevent workout creation success
Event includes all relevant workout metrics
Integration properly tested with mock analytics service
validation_steps: Create simple workout and verify analytics event fired
Test analytics failure scenario doesn't break workout creation
Verify correct metrics passed to analytics service

tasks.title: Unit Tests for Simple Workout Domain Models
tasks.description: Comprehensive unit tests for SimpleWorkout and SimpleExercise domain models covering validation rules, business logic, and edge cases

implementation_details.approach: Test-driven approach covering all validation rules, boundary conditions, and business methods using JUnit5 and AssertJ
tests_to_write: Value object equality and hash code

acceptance_criteria: 90%+ code coverage for domain models
All validation rules tested with valid and invalid inputs
Boundary conditions tested (min/max values)
Business methods tested with various scenarios
Value object behavior (equals, hashCode, toString) verified
validation_steps: Run tests and verify all pass
Check code coverage reports meet 90% threshold
Verify all validation error messages are tested
Ensure edge cases are covered

tasks.title: Unit Tests for Simple Workout Use Cases
tasks.description: Unit tests for CreateSimpleWorkoutUseCase covering success scenarios, validation failures, and error handling with proper mocking

implementation_details.approach: MockK-based testing with comprehensive scenario coverage following existing use case test patterns
tests_to_write: Happy path scenarios with various exercise counts

acceptance_criteria: All use case execution paths tested
Repository and auth service properly mocked
Error scenarios return appropriate Result.failure
Success scenarios return valid SimpleWorkout
Analytics integration tested with mock service
validation_steps: All tests pass consistently
Mock interactions verified correctly
Error handling paths covered
Analytics integration properly tested

tasks.title: Unit Tests for Simple Workout Repository
tasks.description: Unit tests for SimpleWorkoutRepositoryImpl covering database operations, mapping, and error scenarios with in-memory database

implementation_details.approach: Room in-memory database testing with real DAO operations and mapper integration

acceptance_criteria: All repository methods tested with real database operations
User data isolation verified
Database constraints properly tested
Mapping between entities and domain models verified
Error scenarios handled appropriately
validation_steps: All database operations work correctly
User isolation maintained
Constraint violations handled properly
Mapping accuracy verified

tasks.title: UI Tests for Simple Workout Creation Flow
tasks.description: End-to-end Compose UI tests for the complete simple workout creation flow from WorkoutScreen to results screen

implementation_details.approach: Hilt-based UI testing with ComposeTestRule for complete user journey simulation
tests_to_write: Complete creation flow from button tap to results screen

acceptance_criteria: Complete user journey tested from start to finish
All form validation scenarios covered
Navigation flows work correctly
Results screen displays accurate data
Error handling properly tested
validation_steps: End-to-end flow completes successfully
Form validation works as expected
Navigation state preserved correctly
Results screen shows created workout

tasks.title: Accessibility and Performance Tests
tasks.description: Accessibility compliance tests and performance validation for the simple workout creation flow

implementation_details.approach: Accessibility scanner integration and performance benchmarking using Android testing frameworks

acceptance_criteria: All screens pass accessibility scanner checks
Screen reader navigation works correctly
Keyboard navigation fully supported
Form submission completes within 500ms
Screen transitions complete within 200ms
validation_steps: Accessibility scanner reports no violations
Screen reader testing completed successfully
Performance benchmarks meet requirements
Keyboard navigation tested on all screens
